questions.scenario: The Orders API should be reachable only through the approved external load balancer path. Which Cloud Run setting family belongs in the first review?
questions.explanation: Ingress controls which network paths can reach the Cloud Run service.

questions.scenario: A service requires authenticated invokers but still allows broad public ingress. What is true?

options.text: IAM can reject callers, but the network reachability setting is still broad.
IAM automatically changes ingress to internal only.
The service can no longer receive HTTPS.
Egress settings decide who may call the service.

questions.explanation: IAM invocation and ingress reachability are separate controls.

questions.scenario: Which questions belong in Cloud Run ingress review?

options.text: Should callers use the generated URL directly?
Should traffic arrive only through a load balancer path?
Which private database range does outbound traffic use?

questions.explanation: Ingress is about inbound reachability. Private database egress is a different direction.
